About Dr. Robin

Getting You Back to the Life You Love

As a fellowship-trained Sports Medicine physician with residency training in Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation, my foundational practice goals are to not only help you find the root cause of your symptoms, but to focus on how we can get you back to the activities you love.

Whether that's returning to sport as a high-level athlete, training as a weekend warrior, playing with your grandchildren, or even just getting back to day-to-day activities without pain — our physician–patient relationship will center around how we can return you to functioning at high levels.

I always base our management decisions on the highest possible evidence-based treatments, where we work as a team to make the most educated, patient-first medical decisions together.

I hold a Certificate of Added Qualification in Sports Medicine (CAQSM) and am a Titleist Performance Institute (TPI) Certified physician, with a particular passion for golf medicine and helping golfers of all levels stay in the game.

Clinical Expertise

Specialized Care for Active Lives

Sports Injuries & Joint Care

Comprehensive, non-operative evaluation and treatment of shoulder, knee, hip, elbow, ankle, and spine conditions across all ages — from youth athletes to masters-level competitors.

Spine & Pain Management

Evidence-based care for neck pain, back pain, radiculopathy, sacroiliac joint dysfunction, and spinal stenosis — including targeted interventional procedures when indicated.

Ultrasound-Guided Procedures

Precision-guided injections and percutaneous needle tenotomy using real-time musculoskeletal ultrasound for accurate diagnosis and targeted treatment of tendons, joints, and soft tissue.

Regenerative Medicine

Platelet-Rich Plasma (PRP) injections and other evidence-based regenerative therapies designed to accelerate natural healing of musculoskeletal injuries at the cellular level.

Golf Medicine

As a TPI Certified physician and avid golfer, Dr. Robin provides specialized care for golf-related injuries — optimizing your swing biomechanics, preventing injury, and extending your time on the course.

All Ages & Skill Levels

From pediatric athletes (10+) and weekend warriors to professional competitors and active seniors — Dr. Robin meets you where you are and builds a plan tailored to your goals and lifestyle.

Musculoskeletal Care

Common Areas We Treat

Dr. Robin specializes in the full spectrum of musculoskeletal injuries, from everyday aches to complex sports injuries requiring precision intervention.

Knee
Shoulder
Spine & Back
Hip

Conditions treated include tendinopathy, bursitis, rotator cuff injuries, sacroiliac dysfunction, degenerative disc disease, nerve pain, and much more. Call to discuss your specific condition.
